svg.text: A series of nodes connected by a flowing curve, representing teams or stakeholders
routing information through a single conduit. Fading opacity suggests information
in motion from sender to recipient.
Body / 14px 400 — used for all paragraph and UI text
At small sizes the full mark is simplified to a bold "C" on a teal rounded square.
Corner radius scales proportionally with icon size.
Use dark logo on dark backgrounds
Use light logo on white/light backgrounds
Maintain clear space around the mark
Use horizontal lockup in nav bars
Place logo on busy or photo backgrounds
CONDUIT — PATIENT ACCESS COMMUNICATIONS — BRAND GUIDELINES V1.0
